ask-forgeloop.description: Load when the user explicitly asks which Forgeloop skill or workflow fits their current engineering situation.
ask-forgeloop.short_description: Route requests to the right Forgeloop workflow
ask-forgeloop.default_prompt: Use $ask-forgeloop to recommend the right workflow for this engineering situation.

codebase-design.description: Load when module boundaries, interfaces, seams, or dependency direction need to be designed or reshaped for easier change.
codebase-design.short_description: Design deep modules with clear testable seams
codebase-design.default_prompt: Use $codebase-design to design a deep module with a clear seam.

diagnosing-bugs.description: Load when something is broken, failing, throwing, unexpectedly slow, or the user asks to diagnose a bug or regression.
diagnosing-bugs.short_description: Build a tight feedback loop and diagnose root causes
diagnosing-bugs.default_prompt: Use $diagnosing-bugs to build a feedback loop and identify the root cause.

domain-modeling.description: Load when domain terms, bounded concepts, invariants, or durable architectural decisions need to be clarified.
domain-modeling.short_description: Sharpen domain language and durable decisions
domain-modeling.default_prompt: Use $domain-modeling to clarify domain terms and durable decisions.

grill-with-docs.description: Load when the user explicitly wants sustained design clarification that also preserves confirmed domain terms and decisions.
grill-with-docs.short_description: Grill a design while maintaining domain documents
grill-with-docs.default_prompt: Use $grill-with-docs to clarify this design and maintain its domain documents.

grilling.description: Load when a plan or design needs focused adversarial questioning without the document-maintenance workflow.
grilling.short_description: Ask one high impact design question at a time
grilling.default_prompt: Use $grilling to ask one high-impact design question at a time.

handoff.description: Load when the user explicitly wants another session or agent to continue unfinished work without replaying the full conversation.
handoff.short_description: Create a compact temporary handoff for a fresh session
handoff.default_prompt: Use $handoff to prepare a compact temporary handoff for a fresh session.

improve-codebase-architecture.description: Load when the user explicitly asks to inspect a codebase for architectural deepening opportunities or misplaced module boundaries.
improve-codebase-architecture.default_prompt: Use $improve-codebase-architecture to find evidence-backed deepening opportunities.

primary-source-research.description: Load when an engineering question requires current authoritative primary sources rather than memory or secondary summaries.
primary-source-research.short_description: Research questions using cited primary sources
primary-source-research.default_prompt: Use $primary-source-research to investigate this question using cited primary sources.

prototype.description: Load when a design uncertainty is best resolved with a disposable experiment, interaction mockup, or state-model probe.
prototype.short_description: Build a throwaway prototype to answer one design question
prototype.default_prompt: Use $prototype to build a disposable experiment for this design question.

recommend-initiatives.description: Load when the user explicitly asks what evidence-backed engineering initiative the repository should tackle next.
recommend-initiatives.short_description: Recommend evidence backed high value engineering initiatives
recommend-initiatives.default_prompt: Use $recommend-initiatives to identify the next high-value engineering initiatives.

resolving-merge-conflicts.description: Load when a Git merge or rebase has conflicts and both sides' intended behavior must be recovered before resolution.
resolving-merge-conflicts.short_description: Resolve compatible merge intents and expose blockers
resolving-merge-conflicts.default_prompt: Use $resolving-merge-conflicts to recover both sides' intent and resolve the conflict safely.

spec-standards-review.description: Load when implemented code needs review against its intended behavior and repository standards; do not load for exploratory code investigation, impact analysis, or debugging.
spec-standards-review.short_description: Review implemented code on Spec and Standards axes
spec-standards-review.default_prompt: Use $spec-standards-review to review this implemented code on the Spec and Standards axes.

run-initiative.description: Load when the user explicitly wants to execute, resume, recover, or cancel delivery from a formal Tracker Spec or persisted Initiative.
run-initiative.short_description: Run Tracker tickets through coder and dual reviewer gates
run-initiative.default_prompt: Use $run-initiative to run the Tracker-driven delivery loop from this formal Spec.

setup-forgeloop.description: Load when the user explicitly wants to configure or update Forgeloop Tracker integration and repository setup.
setup-forgeloop.short_description: Configure Tracker integration and domain documentation
setup-forgeloop.default_prompt: Use $setup-forgeloop to configure Tracker integration and domain documentation for this repository.

tdd.description: Load when implementing a feature or fixing a bug test-first, especially through a reliable public behavior seam.
tdd.short_description: Drive vertical behavior slices through red and green
tdd.default_prompt: Use $tdd to complete a red-green vertical slice through a public seam.

to-spec.description: Load when the user explicitly wants already-discussed and sufficiently resolved context published as a formal Tracker Spec.
to-spec.short_description: Synthesize approved context into a Tracker Spec
to-spec.default_prompt: Use $to-spec to publish the resolved context as a formal Tracker Spec.

to-tickets.description: Load when the user explicitly wants an approved Spec split into implementation-ready vertical Tickets.
to-tickets.short_description: Split an approved Spec into blocked vertical slices
to-tickets.default_prompt: Use $to-tickets to split the approved Spec into dependent vertical Tickets.

triage.description: Load when the user explicitly wants incoming issues, pull requests, or merge requests classified and routed.
triage.short_description: Triage incoming requests with explicit user approval
triage.default_prompt: Use $triage to discover and classify incoming requests for maintainer action.

wayfinder.description: Load when the user explicitly wants to explore a large ambiguous objective that requires multiple investigation sessions before implementation planning.
wayfinder.short_description: Map and resolve one investigation ticket at a time
wayfinder.default_prompt: Use $wayfinder to map this large ambiguous objective into investigation Tickets.
